description_long: This object is a modern Dell computer monitor with a wide, flat rectangular display and a slim, black bezel framing the screen. The front features a blue display area with the 'Dell Technologies' logo prominently centered. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, rectangular silver stand with a vertical support column that has a circular cable management hole near its base. The rear of the monitor is matte black, with a Dell logo centered on the vertical support. The overall design is sleek and professional, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements. No physical buttons or ports are visible from any angle, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic.
description: A sleek Dell computer monitor with a wide, flat screen, thin black bezel, and a sturdy silver stand. The design is modern and minimalistic, with a blue display and prominent Dell branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flat screen with a thin black bezel and the 'Dell Technologies' logo on a blue display.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the monitor's slim profile and the depth of the silver stand and vertical support.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the matte black back panel, centered Dell logo on the support, and the rectangular silver base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thinness of the monitor and the structure of the stand from another angle.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, flat, and black with a matte finish, providing a minimal frame around the display. It has sharp corners and no visible decorative elements, creating a clean, modern look.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a flat, rectangular silver base with a vertical support column that is also silver and features a circular cable management hole. The design is robust and stable, with no visible adjustability mechanisms.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on the front, sides, or rear of the monitor.
attribute_brand_logo: A 'Dell' logo is present at the center of the bottom bezel on the front and another Dell logo is centered on the rear support column, both in white and clearly visible.
